The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a test document for search functionality.
LoomQuery is an AI-powered document query platform that enables semantic search over uploaded documents.
The platform uses ChromaDB for vector storage and Mastra for embedding generation.
Documents are processed and chunked for efficient retrieval based on semantic similarity.
This sample document contains unique phrases such as: aurora borealis phenomenon and quantum entanglement theory.
These distinctive terms help verify that search results return content from this specific document.
